title: Junior Business Development Manager at Hubtown

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Hubtown
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Business Development Manager looking for your next big career move? Hubtown in Delhi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Hubtown:
Hubtown is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in GIS Tools

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hubtown!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
